There are no logical flaws or misinterpretations evident.\n\n3. **Scores Given to Each Issue**:  \n   - **Malware Score**: All reports assign a malware score of 0, which is appropriate since no malicious behavior is detected.  \n   - **Security Risk**: Slightly above zero (e.g., 0.1 in report 2), possibly reflecting the potential misuse of the contract connection method if used maliciously.
